channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DATAPATTNS] Data Patterns (India) Ltd. Corrects Earlier Communication: Contract Value for Doppler Weather Radars Now Rs. 288 Crores
item.description:
Data Patterns (India) Ltd. has issued a correction to their earlier communication regarding a contract for the supply of Doppler Weather Radars. The correct order value is now stated as Rs. 288 Crores for the supply of 32 units. This correction is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the details are provided as per the requirements.

  • Data Patterns (India) Ltd. corrects earlier communication regarding a contract for Doppler Weather Radars supply.
  • The correct order value is Rs. 288 Crores for the supply of 32 units.
  • This correction is in accordance with SEBI regulations.
  • Details are provided as per the requirements of SEBI regulations.
  • The earlier communication had incorrectly stated the order value and quantity due to an inadvertent error.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Data Patterns (India) Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [AIRFLOA] Airfloa Rail Technology Receives Revised Purchase Order of Rs. 62.36 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd. has received a revised purchase order of Rs. 62.36 Crores from Acme India Industries Limited. The order is for the supply of different items to be used in Railway Coaches as per the list stated in the respective purchase orders. The order will be delivered within the period from 25/03/2026 to 25/03/2027. There are no related party transactions involved and the order was received on 15/03/2026 at 12.24 PM.

  • Airfloa Rail Technology receives revised purchase order of Rs. 62.36 Crores
  • Order to supply different items for use in Railway Coaches
  • Delivery period from 25/03/2026 to 25/03/2027
  • No related party transactions involved
  • Order received on 15/03/2026 at 12.24 PM

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd | Category: Purchase Order

item.title: [BAJAJELEC] Bajaj Electricals Ltd. Receives GST Act Assessment Orders for FYs 2019-20 and 2022-23 in Tamil Nadu
item.description:
Bajaj Electricals Ltd. has received two assessment orders under the Tamil Nadu GST Act for the financial years 2019-20 and 2022-23. The orders, received on March 13, 2026, have demanded a total of approximately Rs. 20 crore, including tax demands, interest, and penalties. The company is currently evaluating legal options, which include filing an appeal or a writ petition. The orders are for alleged discrepancies in input tax credit and turnover difference. The financial impact, if the orders materialize, would be limited to the demanded amount. There is no reported impact on the company's financial, operational, or other activities.

  • Bajaj Electricals Ltd. received two assessment orders under the Tamil Nadu GST Act for FYs 2019-20 and 2022-23.
  • The orders demand a total of approximately Rs. 20 crore, including tax demands, interest, and penalties.
  • The company is evaluating legal options, including filing an appeal or a writ petition.
  • The orders are for alleged discrepancies in input tax credit and turnover difference.
  • The financial impact, if the orders materialize, would be limited to the demanded amount.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ ELECTRICALS LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [PNGJL] P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd Expands Footprint with New Store in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has announced the opening of a new store in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh. The store is located at MO-Shahpur, Arazi No. 10, Bhediyagarh, District Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh — 273006. The new store was inaugurated today, March 15, 2026, at around 07:00 P.M. This expansion brings the total number of stores to 72.

  • P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has expanded its presence with a new store in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh.
  • The new store is located at MO-Shahpur, Arazi No. 10, Bhediyagarh, District Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh — 273006.
  • The store was inaugurated on March 15, 2026, at around 07:00 P.M.
  • This expansion increases the total number of stores to 72.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MEDPLUS] Medplus Health Services Subsidiary Faces Two-Day Suspension of Drug License in Karnataka
item.description:
Medplus Health Services Ltd. has announced that its subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, has received a suspension order for a Drug License of a store situated in the state of Karnataka. The suspension is under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945. The order was received on 14.03.2026 and is expected to result in a revenue loss of Rs 2.88 lacs. The order was passed due to potential violations of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940. The details of the matter are available on the company's website and the websites of BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Ltd.

  • Medplus Health Services subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, receives suspension order for a Drug License
  • Suspension is for a store situated in Karnataka
  • Order received on 14.03.2026 under Rule 65 of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945
  • Expected revenue loss of Rs 2.88 lacs
  • Suspension due to potential violations of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medplus Health Services Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GALACTICO] Galactico Corporate Services Ltd. to Align with SEBI Regulatory Amendments and Strengthen Liquidity
item.description:
Galactico Corporate Services Ltd. held a Board Meeting on March 14-15, 2026, to discuss and note several matters, including recent amendments in SEBI (Merchant Bankers) Amendment Regulations, 2025. The Board noted the need for the Company to undertake necessary changes in its internal policies, procedures, governance framework, compliance systems, and operational processes to align with the amended regulatory requirements. The Board also decided to ensure compliance with the prescribed liquid net worth requirements of INR 2.00 crore, including undertaking appropriate measures such as liquidation of investments, by December 31, 2026.

  • Galactico Corporate Services Ltd. discussed and noted recent amendments in SEBI (Merchant Bankers) Amendment Regulations, 2025.
  • The Company is required to undertake necessary changes in its internal policies, procedures, governance framework, compliance systems, and operational processes to align with the amended regulatory requirements.
  • The Board decided to ensure compliance with the prescribed liquid net worth requirements of INR 2.00 crore by December 31, 2026.
  • The Company is planning to ensure its Net Worth is ring-fenced from any impact that may arise from undertaking the permissible activities in its business unit/subsidiary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galactico Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [GCKL] Demise of Independent Director Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar at Galaxy Supermarket Ltd
item.description:
Galaxy Supermarket Ltd has announced the sudden demise of its Independent Director, Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, on 14th March, 2026. Mr. Dugar had been associated with the Company as a Non-Executive, Independent Director since 14th November, 2023. His experience and expertise in Financial Accounting, Internal Audit & Strategic business planning had been invaluable to the Company. The Board of Directors and senior management convey their deepest sympathy and heartfelt condolences to his bereaved family.

  • Sudden demise of Independent Director Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar
  • Mr. Dugar had been associated with the Company since 14th November, 2023
  • His experience in Financial Accounting, Internal Audit & Strategic business planning was invaluable
  • The Board and senior management convey their condolences to the bereaved family

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galaxy Cloud Kitchens Ltd-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DATAPATTNS] Data Patterns (India) Ltd Secures Rs.279 Crore Contract for Doppler Weather Radars Supply
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Data Patterns (India) Ltd has announced that it has received a contract worth Rs.279 Crore for the supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars to the Indian Metrological Department. The contract was negotiated earlier and is part of a previously announced negotiated contract after Q3 FY 2025-26.

  • Contract value: Rs.279 Crore
  • Supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars
  • Awarded by Indian Metrological Department
  • Part of a previously announced negotiated contract after Q3 FY 2025-26

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Data Patterns (India) Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [ADANIPOWER] Adani Power Receives LoA from MSEDCL for 1,600 MW Long-Term Power Supply
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Power Ltd (APL) has received a Letter of Award (LoA) from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Ltd (MSEDCL) for the supply of 1,600 MW of power from one of its upcoming ultra-supercritical thermal power projects (USCTPP). APL emerged as the lowest-tariff bidder, offering power at a combined tariff of Rs 5.30/kWh. The supply of power under the proposed 25-year Power Supply Agreement (PSA) is scheduled to commence from the financial year 2030-31. This achievement marks yet another PSA win for APL during a period of renewed surge of investments in the thermal power sector.

  • Adani Power received a Letter of Award (LoA) from MSEDCL for the supply of 1,600 MW of power.
  • APL was the lowest-tariff bidder, offering power at a combined tariff of Rs 5.30/kWh.
  • The supply of power is scheduled to commence from the financial year 2030-31 under a 25-year PSA.
  • APL has now tied-up long-term PSAs of 13.3 GW out of its 23.8 GW under-implementation pipeline.
  • More than 95% of Adani Power's current operating capacity of 18.15 GW is now tied up under medium-to-long-term PSAs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI POWER LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [HINDALCO] Hindalco Industries Clarifies Incorrect News Article on Aluminium Product Sales Halt Amid Iran War
item.description:
Hindalco Industries Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a news article titled 'Hindalco halts aluminium product sales amid Iran war', published in mainstream media on March 15, 2026. The company stated that the news article is factually incorrect and misleading. Hindalco has not halted operations of its Aluminium Extrusions business. The communication issued to Aluminium Extrusions customers was a routine business notification regarding a potential supply disruption in a segment of the Extrusions business, which constitutes a small portion of Hindalco’s production capacity and has a limited potential impact of less than 0.1% on the Company’s overall operations. All other Downstream and Upstream operations, including Primary Aluminium, continue to operate normally.

  • Hindalco has not halted operations of its Aluminium Extrusions business
  • The news article titled 'Hindalco halts aluminium product sales amid Iran war' is factually incorrect and misleading
  • The communication issued to Aluminium Extrusions customers was a routine business notification regarding a potential supply disruption
  • The Aluminium Extrusions segment constitutes a small portion of Hindalco’s production capacity
  • All other Downstream and Upstream operations, including Primary Aluminium, continue to operate normally

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDALCO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Clarification
